name: Patient Case
history: History of isolation and chronic depression since late adolescence. Past difficulties with friendships. Recent breakup preceding a relapse into a depressive episode. History of taking SSRIs and recent medication adjustments following the relapse.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: If I open up to others, they will eventually leave me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle being alone, and I will always end up alone.
coping_strategies: Avoids forming close relationships to prevent rejection.
situation: Engaged in a conversation with a friend about mental health struggles.
auto_thought: They will think I'm too much to handle and leave me.
behavior: Withdraws from the conversation and avoids sharing personal feelings.
